Class KeYParser.TacletContext

java.lang.Object
org.antlr.v4.runtime.RuleContext
org.antlr.v4.runtime.ParserRuleContext
de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.KeYParser.TacletContext
All Implemented Interfaces:
ParseTree, RuleNode, SyntaxTree, Tree
Enclosing class:
KeYParser
public static class KeYParser.TacletContext extends ParserRuleContext
